text: As I enter this luminous and orderly space, I am struck by its clinical calmness—glass, light, and symbols of safety. Passing through the threshold, I am drawn inward to where vibrant colors and bold text proclaim a focus on research and development. Here, technology and human inquiry intertwine. I feel curious—on the edge of something new—wondering how this environment will challenge what I know about intelligence, connection, and the future. There is a quiet excitement in participating, in being part of the evolving question that science and philosophy both seek to answer: how do we coexist with the intelligent systems we create?
